questionHtml:
Which molecule can be oxidized to a carboxylic acid by acidified potassium dichromate(VI)?

A.  Propan-1-ol

B.  Propan-2-ol

C.  2-methylpropan-2-ol

D.  Propanone

meta.title: Which molecule can be oxidized to a carboxylic acid by acidified potassium dichromate(VI)? A. Propan-1-ol B. Propan-2-ol C. 2-methylpropan-2-ol D. Propanone
